profile.tagline: I build apps and interfaces, from the browser all the way down to the microcontroller.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a Software Developer in NTT Data's R&D team. I work across the whole stack: Angular and Vue on the frontend, .NET on the backend, and when it's needed I go all the way down to the C code running on microcontrollers. I've built a management tool from scratch — database, backend and UI — handled the frontend of an AI chatbot, and patched security vulnerabilities on software already in production. When I hit a problem, I don't settle for the first thing that works: I look for the right solution.
about.bio2: Outside of work I like telling stories with visuals. I fly a drone for aerial footage, then edit and color grade the videos myself. It's a different way of putting the pieces together than code, but the payoff is the same: start with raw material and turn it into something clean.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind, or just want to chat? Drop me a line.

archive.title: All Projects
archive.subtitle: A collection of the projects I've worked on, in and out of the office.
